name: D/D Lamia
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ラミア
desc: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can send 1 "D/D" or "Dark Contract" card from your hand or face-up field to the GY, except "D/D Lamia"; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "D/D Lamia" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can send 1 "D/D" or "Dark Contract" card from your hand or face-up field to the GY, except "D/D Lamia"; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "D/D Lamia" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand or GY: You can send 1 "D/D" or "Dark Contract" card from your hand or face-up field to the GY, except "D/D Lamia"; Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can only use this effect of "D/D Lamia" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
